name: @rimora/velora
description: Official TypeScript SDK for the Velora Jobs API

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: bump version to %s" && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: bump version to %s" && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore: bump version to %s" && git push origin main --follow-tags

author: Velora
